acmpca.certificate.apipassthrough.CfnAbo:
Contains X.509 certificate information to be placed in an issued certificate. An `APIPassthrough` or `APICSRPassthrough` template variant must be selected, or else this parameter is ignored. 

If conflicting or duplicate certificate information is supplied from other sources, ACM Private CA applies [order of operation rules](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/acm-pca/latest/userguide/UsingTemplates.html

acmpca.certificate.apipassthrough.Extens.Description: Specifies X.509 extension information for a certificate.

acmpca.certificate.apipassthrough.Subjec.Description: Contains information about the certificate subject. The Subject field in the certificate identifies the entity that owns or controls the public key in the certificate. The entity can be a user, computer, device, or service. The Subject must contain an X.500 distinguished name (DN). A DN is a sequence of relative distinguished names (RDNs). The RDNs are separated by commas in the certificate.
